# Rule: payment_card_pan
# Category: financial
# Jurisdiction: global (PCI DSS)

# Keeps the first 6 (BIN) and the last 4 digits; preserves dashes and
# spaces; requires 13-19 ASCII digits. Example: 4111-1111-1111-1111 →
# 4111-11**-****-1111.
